mapper.sql: A.POPUP_ID AS popupId, A.POPUP_SJ_NM AS popupTitleNm, A.FILE_URL AS fileUrl, A.POPUP_VRTICL_LC AS popupHlc, A.POPUP_WIDTH_LC AS popupWlc, A.POPUP_VRTICL_SIZE AS popupHSize, A.POPUP_WIDTH_SIZE AS popupWSize, A.NTCE_BGNDE AS ntceBgnde, A.NTCE_ENDDE AS ntceEndde, A.STOPVEW_SETUP_AT AS stopVewAt, A.NTCE_AT AS ntceAt, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_POPUP_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT FROM TB_POPUP_MANAGE A WHERE A.NTCE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC
SELECT FROM TB_POPUP_MANAGE A WHERE A.NTCE_AT = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_POPUP_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_POPUP_MANAGE A WHERE A.POPUP_ID = #{popupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_POPUP_MANAGE (POPUP_ID, POPUP_SJ_NM, FILE_URL, POPUP_VRTICL_LC, POPUP_WIDTH_LC, POPUP_VRTICL_SIZE, POPUP_WIDTH_SIZE, NTCE_BGNDE, NTCE_ENDDE, STOPVEW_SETUP_AT, NTCE_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID) VALUES (#{popupId}, #{popupTitleNm}, #{fileUrl}, #{popupHlc}, #{popupWlc}, #{popupHSize}, #{popupWSize}, #{ntceBgnde}, #{ntceEndde}, #{stopVewAt}, #{ntceAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{frstRegisterId})
